steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures on each side
steps.content: Left side: an independent clause. Right side: a noun phrase with an appositive.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content: A colon introduces an elaboration or appositive. The other choices—which treat the right side as an independent clause (C, D) or omit punctuation (A)—are incorrect. That matches choice B — B is correct.
